body: {"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria satisfied. Title is imperative and names subsystem + change. Description has all four required sections with specific file:line anchors for all three referenced artifacts. AC items are numbered and verifiable; the documentation-only waiver in AC 7 is explicit and appropriate — pure doc changes carry no Go source to test, and AC 8 preserves the lefthook gate. Labels cover phase, area, kind, and all three cross-reference targets (adr:023, spec:FEAT-010, spec:TD-031). Parent and dep are explicit. No /tmp references or chat-context dependencies. A sub-agent can identify all three files to edit from the description alone.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":["documentation-only waiver: no cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test line required because no Go source is modified; stated explicitly in AC 7"]}
